sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id INT, str_value VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, str_value) VALUES (1, 'hello world');
UPDATE test_strings SET str_value = 'fuzz testing' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, str_value, STRRCHR(str_value, 'o') AS last_occurrence FROM test_strings;
SELECT id, str_value FROM test_strings WHERE STRRCHR(str_value, 'x') IS NULL;
